svg.text: Namespace-aware runtime view derived from live kubectl/docker discovery and the GitOps repo structure
local engine for k3d and compose
JMX exporter in kafka-platform -> Prometheus in dev namespace -> Grafana
Validation reads deployment and runtime state without driving rollout.
live docker runtime: kafka-platform + k3d containers
application workloads, data services, observability, ingress targets
ingress-nginx LoadBalancer svc exposes dev ingress
